## Meeting Purpose

[To address Carta platform issues and discuss 409A valuation for GrowthX AI during their fundraising process.](https://fathom.video/share/5MbpS_2vspfX5Tjx6MvaBMzXbtwcLZsE?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX AI is urgently blocked on 409A valuation due to complex LLC-to-C-Corp asset transfer](https://fathom.video/share/5MbpS_2vspfX5Tjx6MvaBMzXbtwcLZsE?tab=summary&timestamp=74.0)
  - [Previous support interaction was unsatisfactory, leaving critical questions unanswered](https://fathom.video/share/5MbpS_2vspfX5Tjx6MvaBMzXbtwcLZsE?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Carta cap table needs updating to reflect LLC-to-C-Corp transition and current fundraising](https://fathom.video/share/5MbpS_2vspfX5Tjx6MvaBMzXbtwcLZsE?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
  - [Chief of Staff starting Monday will lead follow-up process with Carta](https://fathom.video/share/5MbpS_2vspfX5Tjx6MvaBMzXbtwcLZsE?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)

## Topics

### Current Blockers and Urgency

  - [GrowthX AI amid "crazy" fundraising process](https://fathom.video/share/5MbpS_2vspfX5Tjx6MvaBMzXbtwcLZsE?tab=summary&timestamp=50.0)
  - [Urgent need for 409A valuation](https://fathom.video/share/5MbpS_2vspfX5Tjx6MvaBMzXbtwcLZsE?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)
  - [Complex situation: LLC assets transferred to C-Corp without clear dollar value](https://fathom.video/share/5MbpS_2vspfX5Tjx6MvaBMzXbtwcLZsE?tab=summary&timestamp=74.0)
  - [Support interaction left questions unanswered, forcing exploration of alternative law firms](https://fathom.video/share/5MbpS_2vspfX5Tjx6MvaBMzXbtwcLZsE?tab=summary&timestamp=93.0)
  - [Trickle-down effect: Can't update cap table → can't issue equity](https://fathom.video/share/5MbpS_2vspfX5Tjx6MvaBMzXbtwcLZsE?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)

### Carta Platform Status

  - Delaware incorporation reflected (10M authorized shares, \<$0.01 par value)
  - [Only 40,000 shares currently allocated in system](https://fathom.video/share/5MbpS_2vspfX5Tjx6MvaBMzXbtwcLZsE?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
  - [Cap table incomplete due to ongoing fundraise and LLC-to-Corp conversion](https://fathom.video/share/5MbpS_2vspfX5Tjx6MvaBMzXbtwcLZsE?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [John offered to help navigate platform features and tools](https://fathom.video/share/5MbpS_2vspfX5Tjx6MvaBMzXbtwcLZsE?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)

### 409A Valuation Process

  - [John demonstrated navigation to compliance/tax section for 409A request](https://fathom.video/share/5MbpS_2vspfX5Tjx6MvaBMzXbtwcLZsE?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
  - [Marcel worked with support agent previously on this process](https://fathom.video/share/5MbpS_2vspfX5Tjx6MvaBMzXbtwcLZsE?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Emphasized importance of reflecting new investors and instruments post-fundraise](https://fathom.video/share/5MbpS_2vspfX5Tjx6MvaBMzXbtwcLZsE?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Need for updated Delaware Certificate of Incorporation for preferred stock classes](https://fathom.video/share/5MbpS_2vspfX5Tjx6MvaBMzXbtwcLZsE?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)

### Support and Communication

  - [John recording meeting to escalate feedback to director](https://fathom.video/share/5MbpS_2vspfX5Tjx6MvaBMzXbtwcLZsE?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Marcel unable to recall name of previous unhelpful support agent](https://fathom.video/share/5MbpS_2vspfX5Tjx6MvaBMzXbtwcLZsE?tab=summary&timestamp=415.0)
  - [John committed to following up on unanswered support queries](https://fathom.video/share/5MbpS_2vspfX5Tjx6MvaBMzXbtwcLZsE?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)

## Next Steps

  - [John to follow up via email with 409A valuation process details](https://fathom.video/share/5MbpS_2vspfX5Tjx6MvaBMzXbtwcLZsE?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
  - [New Chief of Staff to contact John on Monday to properly address Carta setup](https://fathom.video/share/5MbpS_2vspfX5Tjx6MvaBMzXbtwcLZsE?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
  - [Schedule future meeting to reflect new investors and instruments post-fundraise](https://fathom.video/share/5MbpS_2vspfX5Tjx6MvaBMzXbtwcLZsE?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Obtain updated Certificate of Incorporation from Delaware](https://fathom.video/share/5MbpS_2vspfX5Tjx6MvaBMzXbtwcLZsE?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
  - [John to investigate previous support interaction and lack of follow-up](https://fathom.video/share/5MbpS_2vspfX5Tjx6MvaBMzXbtwcLZsE?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
